          93.Jergal: Beyond mortal realms, there doth exist an amalgamation of spirits akin to thine own, ensnared by the treacherous cult of the Absolute, felled in its name. !Hirelings_State_ShowIntro

                  142.Jergal: Suspicion always haunts the guilty mind. My services are all that I can proffer thee. What thou wilt do with them is for thee to undertake.

        123.Jergal: Love is no domain of mine. But it is often cited as the purpose of mortal life. Wherefore turnst thou from it?

            297.Jergal: Safely resting in the wardrobe in thy camp. Preserved just so 'til their soul's return - or thou hast need of them.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a37da928-f1f7-5ba0-39c5-f64b1671ffdbSpeaker: 0 (Jergal)Text Handle: h396d3e60g018ag454bgbeb5g898263b18e24Text UUID: 45b08d50-58ca-4684-aaae-560bcf807ffdTimeline Phase Index: 16Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a37da928-f1f7-5ba0-39c5-f64b1671ffdbTimeline Phase Duration: 13.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [136.73s-149.49s] | @ 137.84s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [136.73s-149.49s] | @ 139.63s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [136.73s-149.49s] | @ 142.52s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [136.73s-149.49s] | @ 143.91s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [136.73s-149.49s] | @ 146.58s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2
            • +
              76.Jergal: Without the balance of a soul, a force to drive them, vessels like thine sit limp like garments unworn.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 283fea19-9acc-8a1c-6b20-dc2bb8b3cb59Speaker: 0 (Jergal)Text Handle: h785c3412g0218g4a6cg957bg2e8aef659cb7Text UUID: 7d221bba-c046-4b3c-a674-6b92110df408Timeline Phase Index: 55Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 283fea19-9acc-8a1c-6b20-dc2bb8b3cb59Timeline Phase Duration: 18.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [398.86s-409.12s] | @ 399s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [398.86s-409.12s] | @ 401.38s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [398.86s-409.12s] | @ 403.26s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [398.86s-409.12s] | @ 405.07s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [398.86s-409.12s] | @ 406.61s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [398.86s-409.12s] | @ 407.67s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [409.12s-416.41s] | @ 409.24s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [409.12s-416.41s] | @ 411.14s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [409.12s-416.41s] | @ 414.38s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Group ID: 283fea19-9acc-8a1c-6b20-dc2bb8b3cb59Group Index: 0

            183.Jergal: Remember - thou canst only remove adventurers fully authored by mortal hands. Seekest thy fellow, and ask them to wait in thy camp.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 64eac245-be14-5c13-50fe-78e289ce06a5Speaker: 0 (Jergal)Text Handle: h03777bbfg0ee9g4eefg8653gddfd843d0c80Text UUID: 246e77fd-6ca2-4cf6-9599-b3aafe7928e2Timeline Phase Index: 76Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 64eac245-be14-5c13-50fe-78e289ce06a5Timeline Phase Duration: 23.69sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [548.67s-560.88s] | @ 548.77s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [548.67s-560.88s] | @ 550.54s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [548.67s-560.88s] | @ 554.04s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [548.67s-560.88s] | @ 556.46s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [548.67s-560.88s] | @ 559s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [560.88s-571.41s] | @ 560.96s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [560.88s-571.41s] | @ 562.37s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [560.88s-571.41s] | @ 565.91s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [560.88s-571.41s] | @ 569.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Group ID: 64eac245-be14-5c13-50fe-78e289ce06a5Group Index: 0

            262.Jergal: The girl could not bear thou, a breaker of promises. I told her the fate of her parents when the wind carried it to me.

            Metadata
